info.title: LeapMentor API
info.description:
REST API documentation for LeapMentor — a peer mentorship platform.

## Authentication
Most endpoints require a Bearer token in the `Authorization` header.
Admin endpoints use a separate admin token obtained via `POST /api/v1/admin/auth/login`.

## Base URL
All endpoints are prefixed with `/api/v1`

## Changelog
### v1.0.0 (current)
- Auth: register, OTP verification, login, password reset, Google OAuth, Clerk SSO
- Profiles: mentor & mentee profile creation and management
- Mentor Discovery: search and autocomplete
- Availability: mentor slot management
- Connect Requests: full lifecycle — send, respond, refer, cancel
- Slot Locking: optimistic concurrency control during booking
- Escrow: token-based payment flow — pay, release, refund
- Sessions: slot scheduling, meeting links, status transitions
- Goals & Milestones: per-session goal tracking
- Messages: real-time chat history (REST layer)
- Notes: shared and private note uploads
- Feedback: post-session ratings
- Reports: dispute management
- Notifications: in-app notification feed
- Push: Web Push subscription management
- Invoices: PDF invoice download
- Earnings: mentor payout dashboard
- Google Calendar: OAuth integration & busy-slot sync
- AI: Groq-powered help center proxy
- Admin: dashboard, analytics, user management, verifications, payments, reports, settings
- Support: help center message submission

bearerAuth.description: JWT access token obtained from login or refresh endpoints

ErrorResponse.description: Standard error shape returned by fail() / AppError via handleError().

ValidationErrorResponse.description: Returned for Joi validation failures (middleware/validate.js) and Mongoose ValidationError.

UnprocessableResponse.description: Returned by unprocessable() — request is well-formed but semantically invalid (e.g. slot already booked, escrow already paid).

ConflictResponse.description: Returned on MongoDB duplicate key violation (E11000), e.g. registering with an email that already exists.

SanitizedUser.description: toUserDTO() output — password, passwordChangedAt, __v, isDeleted, deletedAt stripped.

post.summary: Send an email OTP for account verification

400.description: Email missing/invalid, resend cooldown still active, or already verified.
OTP missing, malformed, expired, or incorrect.

get.summary: Verify email via link token
get.description: Used for the email-link verification flow (as opposed to OTP). Accepts ?email=... as a query param.

get.summary: Get the logged-in user's own account data

post.description: Mentor role only. Rate-limited via uploadLimiter. Accepts a resume (1 file) and work experience docs (up to 3 files).
Public — submitted from the HelpCenter form, no auth required. Rate-limited via supportLimiter.

get.summary: List help center messages (admin)

patch.summary: Mark a help center message as resolved (admin)

post.summary: Lock a slot during the booking flow
post.description: Mentee role only. Optimistic concurrency control to prevent double-booking while the mentee finalizes a request.

409.description: Slot is already locked by another user.

delete.description: Mentee role only. Used when a mentee deselects a slot.

delete.summary: Unlock all slots locked by the logged-in mentee
delete.description: Used when a mentee closes the booking modal without confirming.

get.summary: Get active slot locks for a mentor
get.description: Used internally by the mentor's availability view to show which slots are currently being booked by others.

get.summary: Get all session slots for a connect request

403.description: Not a party to this connect request.
Not a party to this connect request.

get.summary: Get the mentor's availability scoped to a connect request
get.description: Used when scheduling/rescheduling a slot for an existing session.

403.description: Not a party to this connect request.

patch.summary: Set the meeting link for a session slot

400.description: Meeting link missing or not HTTPS.

403.description: Not a party to this connect request.

patch.summary: Mark a slot complete, cancel it, or reschedule it
patch.description: Single noun-based endpoint driven by action in the request body, replacing three separate verb-action routes. reason is only accepted when action="cancel"; date/startTime/endTime are required when action="reschedule".

400.description: Validation failed for the given action (e.g. reschedule missing date/time).

403.description: Not a party to this connect request.

post.description: Mentor or mentee role. Accepts an optional screenshot upload. Rate-limited via reportLimiter.

get.summary: Get the logged-in user's own report for a connect request
List all reports (admin)
get.description: Admin role only. Paginated, filterable by status.

patch.summary: Update report status / add admin note

get.summary: Get the VAPID public key for Web Push subscription
get.description: No authentication required — needed by the browser before the user is necessarily logged in.

patch.description: At least one of title/content is required.

400.description: Validation failed — body must include at least one field.

get.summary: Get all private notes for a session
Get the logged-in user's notification feed

patch.summary: Mark a single notification as read

post.summary: Upload a note file (shared or private)

400.description: Missing file or invalid file type.

get.summary: Get the logged-in user's own private notes for a session
get.description: Route is registered before /:connectRequestId to avoid being shadowed by the generic shared-notes route.

get.summary: Get shared notes for a session

403.description: Not a party to this connect request.

get.summary: Get the unread message count for a connect request
Search and autocomplete mentors
get.description: Mentee role only. Uses Atlas Search (autocomplete + text operators) with role/isDeleted filters and regex fallback.

403.description: Logged-in user does not have the mentor role.

get.description: No authentication required.

bio.example: Looking to grow into engineering leadership.

post.summary: Create a new leap (wallet top-up) request

200.description: Paginated list of all leap requests.

get.summary: Download the PDF invoice for a paid session
get.description: Only accessible by the mentee who made the payment. Returns a raw PDF binary.

403.description: Not the mentee who made this payment.

404.description: No invoice found for this connect request.

get.summary: Get a resized profile image URL
get.description: Returns a Cloudinary URL resized to the requested dimensions. Serves the pre-generated eager variant if available, otherwise generates and caches it on the fly.

get.summary: Get the Google OAuth URL to open in a popup
Google OAuth consent callback (no auth — Google calls this directly)
get.description: Not called by the frontend. Google redirects here after the user grants/denies consent. Responds with an HTML page containing a nonce-scoped inline script that postMessages the result to the popup's opener window and closes itself.

200.description: HTML page with a postMessage script (success or error — both return 200 by design).

get.summary: Check whether the mentor's Google Calendar is connected
Get busy windows from the mentor's primary calendar
get.description: Used by the slot busy badge in the availability UI.

get.summary: Get event names across all accessible calendars
get.description: Deduplicated. Used by the calendar grid tooltip.

post.summary: Sign in / sign up via Google OAuth ID token

400.description: Missing or invalid Google ID token.

post.summary: Sign in / sign up via Clerk SSO session token

400.description: Missing or invalid Clerk session token.

patch.summary: Change password for the logged-in user

400.description: New password fails validation, or current password is incorrect.

post.summary: Exchange a valid refresh token cookie for a new access token
post.description: Reads the HttpOnly refresh token cookie; no request body.

401.description: Refresh token missing, expired, or revoked.

post.description: Creates a user account as mentor or mentee. Rate-limited via registerLimiter.

201.description: Account created. An OTP verification email is sent.

400.description: Joi validation failed — e.g. missing field, weak password, terms not accepted.

409.description: An account with this email already exists.

post.summary: Log in with email and password
post.description: Authenticates a user and returns an access token in the response body. A refresh token is set as an HttpOnly cookie. Rate-limited via loginLimiter.

400.description: Joi validation failed — email/password missing or malformed.

401.description: Email not registered, or password incorrect.

403.description: Account is blocked, or email not yet verified (response includes isEmailVerified: false and email for resending OTP).

value.message: Your account has been blocked. Please contact support.
Please verify your email before logging in.

post.description: Clears the refresh token cookie and invalidates the stored refresh token.
Sends a 6-digit OTP to the given email. Rate-limited via forgotPasswordLimiter.

200.description: OTP sent if the email is registered (response is identical whether or not the account exists, to avoid email enumeration).

400.description: OTP missing, malformed, expired, or incorrect.

post.summary: Confirm password reset with OTP and set a new password
post.description: Sends { email, otp, newPassword } — NOT a reset token. Rate-limited via forgotPasswordLimiter.

400.description: OTP invalid/expired, or new password fails validation.

post.description: Rate-limited via aiLimiter. Forwards messages + systemPrompt to Groq (llama-3.1-8b-instant), 10s timeout.

200.description: AI response, reformatted to match the shape HelpCenter.jsx expects.

400.description: messages array missing or not an array.

502.description: Groq API returned an error (raw vendor error is never forwarded to the client).

504.description: Groq API did not respond within 10 seconds.
